rulings.Case Title: CONSERVATORSHIP OF JAMES YATES
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Approval Of Fees And Costs Advanced To Conservatee'S Court-Appointed Attorney And For Discharge As Attorney Of Record
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. appearance required. Issue: court to determine requested fees. Appears attorney is billing for a will/trust that were never executed. It appears attorney is billing for Reviewing copies of Mr. Yates Wills on 05/29/18 and 8/14/19. Attorney is billing $510.00 for a substituted judgement petition that was appears to have never been filed. Attorney is billing $262.50 to research: re client's relatives. Attorney is billing for mileage. Mileage, parking and tolls are absorbed as part of fees. [LRSF 14.91.]

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF PEARL CALHOUN
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Grant without hearing. Although an "amendment" requires the same notice, including publication, as the pleading it amends, the Court waives notice of the "amendment" that was filed on 1/14/20, as the information was primarily supplemental in nature, not a material or substantive change to the petition. Notice of Hearing was the outdated Judicial Council form. In any event, CRC 7.53(a) would have required the Notice of Petition to Administer Estate had the Court determined notice was required. Status of closing the estate is set for 8/10/21.
